education_and_academic_qualification: Vitezslav "Vita" Beran is an Associate professor and Vice-dean for Marketing and External Relations at the Faculty of Information Technology, Brno University of Technology (FIT BUT). He graduated from BUT (Ing. and PhD) and was a visiting researcher at CVSSP, University of Surrey. His research interests include image, video and depth data processing, human-robot interaction (collaboration), augmented reality and artificial intelligence. He was the team leader of several local and European-funded projects. At FIT, he is responsible for the User Interface Programming course and, partially, the Image Processing course. As vice-dean, he is engaged in partnerships and cooperation with industry, alumni, and high schools. He is a key founder of the Excel@FIT and ZijemeIT conferences, international summer school BISSIT, and the Star(t)up@FIT entrepreneurship development programme.
